name: Torrentio
description: Torrent streams from YTS, EZTV, The Pirate Bay, 1337x and more — aggregated and sorted by seeders.
author: HephaestWatch

variables.label: TMDB API Key (optional)
variables.description: Optional override — if empty, the key from the TMDB addon is used automatically.

variables.label: Quality filter
variables.description: e.g. BluRay,WEB — leave empty for all qualities.
